steps.title: Write the phosphorus amount
steps.content: Each kilogram contains $600$ milligrams of phosphorus. For $x$ kilograms, the total phosphorus is $600x$ milligrams.

steps.title: Set the total
steps.content: The sample contains $1{,}200$ milligrams total, so $600x=1{,}200$.

steps.title: Check the units
steps.content: The units confirm the setup: $600$ milligrams per kilogram times $x$ kilograms gives milligrams. That product must equal the total amount, $1{,}200$ milligrams.
